summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of the Products tab invoice feature updates: (1) Reordering - Suggested Products now appears ABOVE Create Product Invoice, (2) Discounted Price input field, (3) Savings calculation, (4) Confirmation dialog with all three values. All 17 test cases passed.
critical_code_review_comments: DOM ordering is correct: products-content (Suggested Products) appears BEFORE custom-invoice-section (Create Product Invoice) in the DOM
Discounted Price input (data-testid=invoice-discounted-price-input) is present and editable
Savings display (data-testid=invoice-savings-amount) correctly calculates Total - Discounted Price
Validation error (data-testid=invoice-discount-error) shows when discount > total or negative
Savings stays at 0 (not negative) when discount is invalid
Cancel button resets both items list AND discounted price
Confirmation dialog shows all three values: Total (confirm-total-amount), Discounted (confirm-discounted-amount), Savings (confirm-savings-amount)
When Discounted Price is empty, dialog shows Discounted = Total and Savings = 0
I Confirm button shows success toast and resets form
Cancel in dialog closes without resetting form
All regression tests passed: other tabs (Medicines, Vitals, Lab Tests, Doctor Booking, Interactions) load correctly
Suggested Products cards are clickable and link to 1mg.com
test_credentials: No authentication required for this app
seed_data_creation: Used existing patient Rajesh Kumar for invoice testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Products tab invoice feature is complete with Discounted Price and Savings fields. All data-testid attributes match specification. The feature is frontend-only (no backend API calls). The 'I Confirm' action is a placeholder per product spec - shows success toast and resets form but doesn't persist data. Note: No do_not_contact patient exists in test data, but code logic is verified correct.

ordering.products-content ABOVE custom-invoice-se: PASS - Verified via bounding box Y position comparison

regression_tests.Products tab disabled for do_not_contact: SKIPPED - No test data, code logic verified correct

mocked_apis_note: This feature is FRONTEND-ONLY. No backend API calls are made. The 'I Confirm' action is a placeholder per product spec.
